innocent_bunny.pullReason: She is good if you have Starlight Guardian Tyr, otherwise her usage is very limited. Consider pulling low dupe count in order to save for onsen banners.

bittersweet_bunny.pullReason: Although her priority is lower than, for example, Celia and Loen. Her conditional skill greatly limits her usage.

celebrity_bunny.pullReason: She is undeniably one of the strongest DPS for a general content, has good scaling versus a lot of enemies and is limited.

masquerade_bunny.pullReason: She is important limited support-chainer, used in almost every Fiend Hunter and Guild Raid season. Essential for her rest costumes to perform well.

overheat.pullReason: She was buffed recently but that does not make her more important compared to Tyr or other banners.

robin_hood.pullReason: She is an important support for Fiend Hunter / Guild Raid. Her +3 dupe gives ability to use the costume for free (assuming Potential Liberation done), which is important in a lot of cases.
pros: Imporant for a lot of modes

vanguard.pullReason: Unless you are at the end game. He is niche DoT DPS who scales based on enemy Magic ATK, making him very niche.

queen_of_gluttis.pullReason: She is an important Magic type buffer which is similar to Homunculus Lathel. She is new addition to general magic teams and thus should be pulled as much as possible.

snow_white.pullReason: Unless you have a lot of spare pulls. This costume has great damage capabilities for a nuker like Ventana, but high breakpoint (+3) and other banners priorities shift focus from this one.
pros: Wider AOE compared to rest of Ventana's costumes
cons: Hardly suitable for general content
Less important in comparison to rest banners

shrine_maiden_of_purification.pullReason: This costume is quite hard to utilize at its maximum, but sheer damage boost even without conditional increase worth a lot to not skip her. She offers same value of buff as Onsen Manager Liberta, without chain requirenment, making her very powerful magic buffer in almost every mode.
cons: Hard to fully utilize

onsen_manager.pullReason: This costume is rotational costume to Dark Saintess Liberta, providing bonus for high-chain teams. Necessary for Guild Raid, Fiend Hunter, Last Night.
cons: Not suitable for general content

onsen_practitioner.pullReason: This costume is the weakest amongst all 3 Ventana costumes, offering self-buff. Similar to Snow White, requires somewhat high dupe for last breakpoint. Loses in priority to rest banners. Mostly used as rotation for Fiend Hunter and Guild Raid.
cons: Weakest damage of all 3 Ventana costumes
Less important in comparison to rest banners
High breakpoint

the_fiend_scholar.pullReason:
He is somewhat niche support, providing SP regen and silencing enemies. Unfortunately for him, Silence works on limited pool of enemies, and his SP battery has somewhat long cooldown.

Make sure to recruit him from pub for free 10 Draw Tickets.
cons: Niche
Less important in comparison to rest banners

modes.gen: Good for towers, mid / niche for rest

onsen_swordfighter.pullReason: This costume is pure DPS with slight synergy with Young Lady Costume, but requires way more than that to be good.
pros: Decent DMG output in proper teams
cons: Hard to utilize Conditional DMG to full extend
Loses priority due to supports in other banners
Weaker AoE compared to Young Lady Costume

sword_breaker.pullReason: This costume, and Alec overall, is niche PvP unit, meaning you should not go for him at all.
cons: Fixed Damage is very hard to utilize in PvE
Outclassed in most PvP comps
Bad AoE

apostle_blade.pullReason:
This is main Blade DPS costume and it has high ceiling, but is niche in PvE due to counter mechanic. This banner additionally loses priority due to buffers still being available during first week.

Make sure to recruit her from pub to get 10 tickets.
cons: Niche usage of Counter mechanic
Requires external investment due to her being a glass cannon unit

modes.gen: Meta for Tower of Wrath, Niche / Mid for rest

magical_innovator.pullReason:
While this costume has own issues and just dilutes the Property Damage Increase, it still is a buffer and you basically lose nothing when using it.
+0 already gives 100% Property Damage buff (on max stacks) which is good enough if you're new player, higher dupes are important for mostly rankers and late-game players.
pros: Increases Diana's tankiness on the field
Moderately cheap summon that can be used as a meat shield for cheesing some fights (although niche)
cons: Slow to gain max buff (7 turns)
Summon must always activate the ability to keep the stacks
Summon has mediocre AoE

breakpoints: Bigger increase of both base & conditional damage (400% → 475%; 600% → 675%)
Bigger increase of both base & conditional damage (475% → 550%; 725% → 800%)
maid_name_r.pullReason: This costume is a great DPS, especially in Fiend Hunter / Guild Raid, but after the DoT cap stacks increase she's moved towards the usage on the last turn only, making her more ranking costume.
cons: Relies on having DoT to shine

retired_legend.pullReason: Despite being fourth Olivier costume, this one is making her more well-rounded, allowing her to take support role even further. Domain is a great thing for self-buff or second team buff, although it would compete with usage of Eleaneer since two Domains cannot be deployed at the same time.
pros: At very least, great self-buff costume
Allows Olivier to be a decent support (assuming having Faithful Wings costume)
cons: High SP to use in general contest as support
Conficting Domains mean competing in usage with Eleanner off-element
Somewhat weak AoE
No full up-time (for GR, for example)

modes.ln: Has potential, but for now Mid

breakpoints: Crit DMG Buff Duration Increase (4 → 6 turns)
acting_archbishop.pullReason:
While this is mostly self-buff costume, it is worthless without rest Michaela Costumes, especially Queen of Signatures one. It has great AoE but her damage ruins that benefit of hers.
You could invest if you build Michaela, but that's about it.

Don't forget to recruit her in pub (Random Appearance) for free 10 tickets during her rerun.
cons: Greatly reduces Michaela survivability due to gimmick
No DPS capabilities
Useless at her own

shattered_dream.pullReason:
She has decent damage even at low dupes, and debuff extension is unique skill you do not want to miss.
She's also expected to have another costume soon, meaning missing current will be terrible for her rotation.

She will be in Story Pack 20 Pub, so you can get 1 copy from there.
pros: Decent Damage at low dupes for the cost

reclaimed_destiny_sacred_justia.pullReason: She is great DPS with damage scaling based on enemy count, meaning she's good for almost any AoE fight. Her +4 is important breakpoint to be able to use skill each turn.
cons: Requires high investment for constant damage
Bad for single target fights
Slightly loses priority to other banners

b-rank_idol_helena.pullReason:
Although she's not as OP as Liberta, she is still undeniably the core for almost every Magic team.

Don't forget that she is available in Recommended ★5 Costume Selective Tickets, where taking +1 Helena is recommended from the start.

night_of_death.pullReason:
Despite being HP-based damage dealer, she got everything you could ask for: low cost, great AoE, high chain count and great damage. Second costume should be released soon as well, filling the missing rotation.

Keep in mind Mamonir will be accesible in Pub (Random pool), so make sure to recruit her for 10 tickets as well as reducing tickets usage on the banner.
cons: Need specific (HP) gear to work
Has a rotation gap

bikini_agent.pullReason:
This costume is Sylvia's nuke costume and is very important for her rotation due to buff extension. However Sylvia heavily relies on Sword Queen costume, which makes heavy Sylvia investment somewhat questionable.
Moreover, newly released Mamonir can take a spotlight soon in terms of main DPS of the team.
cons: Requires high investment for other costumes
Possible priority shift due to Mamonir

kind_ruthlessness.pullReason: Nowadays her main usage is in Last Night and very rarely — Fiend Hunter, but, realistically, she's been outperformed by Wilhelmina as chainer completely. Getting 1 or 2 copies is a good idea unless you're going to be really competitive.
cons: Rare usage outside of Last Night

noble_flame.pullReason: She's just bad. The only use case for her theoretically is in the Golden Colosseum, and even this is with a HUGE question mark.
cons: 3 CD for 1-costume character without any future costumes
VERY fragile buff
Low damage multiplier

fist_of_conviction.pullReason: Basic Attack Augmentation may seem good on paper until you realize it means no AoE coverage and mediocre damage output when casting the skill itself.
cons: No real usage pretty much anywhere

dancing_snowflake.pullReason: Despite being "not that bad" of a costume, she's outperformed by almost every Water DPS and rarely sees any usage even in 3rd team in Fiend Hunter.
cons: Weak AOE
Rarely has any usage

shadowed_dream.pullReason: She's great amplifier, being versatile with all elements, and even better for Darkness property. Her AoE is not the greatest, but her tiles align with her second costume, Little Pumpkin Girl, so it's not as terrible.
pros: Decent damage as for non-main DPS costume

miracle_rose.pullReason:
This is not a buffer costume, but, nonetheless, it is quite good 1SP chainer that fills Liberta downtime in rotation. Additionally, she will provide decent cheap damage.
Her Crit Rate self-buff makes her an excellent choice in PvP.
cons: Not a buffer (compared to rest her costumes)

maid_bikini.pullReason: This is very important costume for DoT teams since it provide enormous buff value. Although that means you need to have good DoT unit such as Liatris to play with this costume.
cons: Need DoT units investment to utilize

miracle_violet.pullReason: It is the costume that pairs very well with existing Darkness Magic team, however her output damage heavily depends on the very same team she's helping. Necessary for Palette rotation overall and offers fair amount of hits / chains.
pros: Good Damage if condition is triggered
Strenghtening own position as Sonya support
cons: Tough condition to have impact outside of speficic teams

dj.pullReason:
Venaka alone is decent DPS, but she's completely blasted out of the competition by Nebris and Tyr, who are the powerhouses for Wind damage overall.

That being said, she's fair PvP and PvE costume, offering MRES reduction and decent damage. New Burst mechanic will allow her to have 1CD, which may or may not be impactful further on.
cons: Outdamaged by Physical counterparts such as Nebris / Tyr

miracle_marine.pullReason:
This Costume seems to be quite niche, however, she has tremendous raw values.

If you invested in Mamonir beforehand, she is most likely Recommended.
If you did not invest in Mamonir, she is more like Optional.

Mamonir was already used as Support even outside Water seasons, and this Costume will probably force it down even more. Therefore +1 can be a compromise to maintain her viability without heavily investing before Anniversary.
cons: Unconvenient use tile-wise

beach_vacation_morphea.pullReason:
Getting at least +0 is a great, since this the best Water Mage DPS at the moment.
However, her output heavily scales with copies, and overcommitting to the banner can bite you during the Anniversary.
cons: Heavily copies-dependent for damage scale

ocean_vanguard.pullReason: She will help the other costumes of her to do just more DMG and can stack a few chains on off turns on longer fights. The Buff has a full uptime which is always good!
cons: Needs other Costumes to get benfit from selfbuffs

deadeye.pullReason: She is mostly a PVP Unit for now with just one costume. High Chain are good in Last Night. Otherwise not really worth the pulls for now.
pros: First Costumes that can ignore Evades
cons: Niche Pattern
Only 1 Costume atm

beachside_justice.pullReason: Michaela can buff herself for strong follow up turns with her 'Queen of Signatures'-Costume. Big Downside is her HP-Reduction from useing this Skill. Pattern also not the greatest.
cons: Deal 80% of Current HP as DMG to Michaela
Niche Pattern
Meh DMG

prophetic_dream.pullReason: Darian is a great DPS... if she can hit enough tiles. She mostly suffers from the weak Skillpattern. Darian is a stable atm in Last Night and every FH / GR her Attack hits a lot of tiles otherwise she is outclassed by other water dpses.
cons: Skip X-Pattern

pool_party_justia.pullReason: Justia really suffers from beeing an old Unit. Her main focus is fixed DMG which this costume helps via selfbuff. Problem is just Fixed DMG is really bad outside of PVP. And even in PVP Olivier pretty much replaced her there with a preemptive Evade.
cons: Fixed Dmg is Justia Main DMG Source

pool_party_scheherazade.pullReason: Schera is PVP stable and those that enjoy PVP want her. Otherwise for Newbies / Casuals just get a Copy if you want for the Wallpaper / Gacha Skin and then move on.
cons: Bad Pattern
Low DMG for PVE use

beachside_angel.pullReason:
Teresse is a must have support thanks to her versatility for both Magic and Physical teams. Additionally, her buff is not diluted by most buffs (except another Augmentation and Vulnerability), which makes her multiply damage outputeffectively.

The only downside is locking your team onto low chains setup, which is slight problem for Guild Raid and sometimes Fiend Hunter, but otherwise, she carries insane value as a Support.
pros: Strong Buff Value in unique damage bracket
Universal for both Magic and Physical Teams
cons: Requires low chains
Limited Costume

combat_medic.pullReason:
To put it simply, if you have your Granhildr already built, she is important to get at least +3 for the maximum self-buff value for Boo Ghost Costume. Otherwise, you could compromise at +1, since, without strong Comeback Idol and Boo Ghost dupes, her damage will not be great.

Buff requirenment is very easy to obtain, so she will work as Beach Sylvia in that regard most of the time.
pros: Makes rotation a bit more clear
cons: Useless without invested other Granhildr Costumes (Comeback Idol + Boo Ghost)
Not the best CDMG Buff value (200% only)
